target_market_label.zh: 阿根廷（IRAM / 能源秘书处）
target_market_label.zht: 阿根廷（IRAM / 能源秘書處）

title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入阿根廷：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入阿根廷：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Argentina IRAM / IEC battery and storage standards, CAMMESA grid-connection expectations, fire-safety review, 50 Hz deployment, UN 38.3 transport, and China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与阿根廷IRAM/IEC电池及储能标准、CAMMESA并网要求、消防安全审查、50Hz部署、UN 38.3运输以及中国GB 44240-2024/GB/T 36276-2023证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與阿根廷IRAM/IEC電池及儲能標準、CAMMESA併網要求、消防安全審查、50Hz部署、UN 38.3運輸以及中國GB 44240-2024/GB/T 36276-2023證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IRAM scope determination, Secretaria de Energia or CAMMESA grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Argentina standards, electricity-market, grid, transport, fire, customs, and provincial or municipal requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IRAM适用范围裁定、能源秘书处或CAMMESA并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行阿根廷标准、电力市场、并网、运输、消防、海关以及省级或市政要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IRAM適用範圍裁定、能源秘書處或CAMMESA併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿根廷標準、電力市場、併網、運輸、消防、海關以及省級或市政要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Argentina, there is no single universal Argentina BESS product certificate that automatically replaces project due diligence. The main gaps are IRAM / IEC evidence requested by buyers or engineers, UN 38.3 lithium-battery transport documentation, CAMMESA and local grid-connection studies for SADI projects, site fire-safety approval, 50 Hz equipment suitability, and a clause-by-clause crosswalk from China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 to the Argentina project route.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口阿根廷时，通常不存在一个可自动替代项目尽调的统一阿根廷BESS产品证书。主要差距包括买方或工程师要求的IRAM/IEC证据、UN 38.3锂电池运输文件、SADI项目的CAMMESA及本地并网研究、现场消防安全批准、50Hz设备适配，以及中国GB 44240-2024/GB/T 36276-2023与阿根廷项目路径之间的逐条映射。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口阿根廷時，通常不存在一個可自動替代項目盡調的統一阿根廷BESS產品證書。主要差距包括買方或工程師要求的IRAM/IEC證據、UN 38.3鋰電池運輸文件、SADI項目的CAMMESA及本地併網研究、現場消防安全批准、50Hz設備適配，以及中國GB 44240-2024/GB/T 36276-2023與阿根廷項目路徑之間的逐條映射。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
